view.title: Validate explicit UC need #2
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for delivery attempts with retry policy and backoff is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 2 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for delivery attempts with retry policy and backoff is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The linked use case clearly describes a scenario where a WhatsApp provider times out twice, leading to automatic delivery retries that succeed on the third attempt. This directly supports the requirement for a retry policy and backoff mechanism. Additionally, the evidence from the use case indicates that the system is capable of handling retries and logging delivery history, confirming that the requirement is met.
